---
title: "Seal, or, The Inward Spiritual Grace of Confirmation, The by C.M. Yonge."
---

## Seal, or, The Inward Spiritual Grace of Confirmation, The by C.M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** n. d. (1869)
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** London: John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row. Masters and Son, 78, New Bond Street.

### Notes

An early instance of CMY allowing her name to appear, though not in the form she ultimately adopted.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
